testcase.name: testGetUserById
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-05 16:32:25.876 [main] INFO c.a.cases.testcases.UserApiTest - 初始化测试: testGetUserById 2026-05-05 16:32:25.888 [main] INFO c.a.common.config.ConfigManager - 配置文件加载成功: config.properties 2026-05-05 16:32:25.889 [main] INFO c.a.common.config.ConfigManager - 当前环境: test 2026-05-05 16:32:25.889 [main] INFO c.a.cases.testcases.UserApiTest - 当前读取到的API Key: pro_9deaf54c789fc909d0f0bc58eba4fcbf2ebb6c601f19e7145f1c602ff209cf81 2026-05-05 16:32:25.944 [main] INFO c.a.cases.testcases.UserApiTest - 执行步骤: 发送获取用户请求: userId=2 2026-05-05 16:32:26.446 [main] INFO com.apitest.core.filter.LogFilter - ========== HTTP Request ========== GET https://reqres.in/api/users/2 Headers: x-api-key: pro_9deaf54c789fc909d0f0bc58eba4fcbf2ebb6c601f19e7145f1c602ff209cf81 Accept: */* Content-Type: application/json ================================= 2026-05-05 16:32:28.877 [main] INFO com.apitest.core.filter.LogFilter - ========== HTTP Response ========== Status: 200 HTTP/1.1 200 OK Duration: 2422 ms Headers: Date: Tue, 05 May 2026 08:32:27 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Cache-Control: public, max-age=14400, s-maxage=60 Cdn-Cache-Control: max-age=60 Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin Etag: W/"308-APPL9XGtuWpWVioqllBYhlwgDYY" Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Origin-Agent-Cluster: ?1 Ratelimit-Limit: 20 Ratelimit-Policy: 20;w=60 Ratelimit-Remaining: 19 Ratelimit-Reset: 60 Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=uWaJSIZe4aHGSQSbYj8G1Z167PxEtQ5QyPE7tnZerbw%3D\u0026sid=c4c9725f-1ab0-44d8-820f-430df2718e11\u0026ts=1777969925"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=uWaJSIZe4aHGSQSbYj8G1Z167PxEtQ5QyPE7tnZerbw%3D&sid=c4c9725f-1ab0-44d8-820f-430df2718e11&ts=1777969925" Server: cloudflare Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains Via: 1.1 heroku-router X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Dns-Prefetch-Control: off X-Download-Options: noopen X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies: none X-Powered-By: ReqRes.in - Deploy backends in 30 seconds X-Ratelimit-Limit: 250 X-Ratelimit-Remaining: 98 X-Ratelimit-Reset: 1778025600 X-Reqres-Docs: https://reqres.in X-Reqres-Message: This API is powered by ReqRes. Deploy your own backend in 30 seconds! X-Reqres-Templates: https://app.reqres.in/templates X-Reqres-Tip: Create your own backend with persistent data - app.reqres.in/dashboard X-Reqres-Trial: true X-Reqres-Trial-Days-Remaining: 14 X-Reqres-Trial-Expires: 2026-05-18T08:59:20.975Z X-Reqres-Upgrade: https://app.reqres.in/upgrade X-Request-Id: e59f193c-dabc-8bf2-bfe4-14fffda227da X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow X-Xss-Protection: 0 Age: 21 cf-cache-status: HIT Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9f6e650bdce95098-HKG Body: {"data":{"id":2,"email":"janet.weaver@reqres.in","first_name":"Janet","last_name":"Weaver","avatar":"https://reqres.in/img/faces/2-image.jpg"},"support":{"url":"https://benhowdle.im/first-cto-playbook?utm_source=reqres&utm_medium=json&utm_campaign=referral","text":"Become a better CTO. A playbook of painful stories and practical advice from a two-time startup CTO."},"_meta":{"powered_by":"ReqRes","docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","variant":"v1_b","message":"This is a read-only demo endpoint. Sign up to create your own collections with full CRUD and auth.","cta":{"label":"Get started","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade"},"context":"legacy_success"}} ================================== 2026-05-05 16:32:28.882 [main] INFO c.a.cases.testcases.UserApiTest - 执行步骤: 验证响应状态码 2026-05-05 16:32:28.886 [main] INFO c.a.cases.testcases.UserApiTest - 执行步骤: 验证用户数据
